scripts.eas:build:android: pnpm -C apps/mobile exec eas build --platform android
scripts.eas:build:ios: pnpm -C apps/mobile exec eas build --platform ios
scripts.eas:build:all: pnpm -C apps/mobile exec eas build --platform all
scripts.eas:build:android:prod: pnpm -C apps/mobile exec eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.eas:build:ios:prod: pnpm -C apps/mobile exec eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.eas:build:all:prod: pnpm -C apps/mobile exec eas build --platform all --profile production
scripts.eas:submit:android: pnpm -C apps/mobile exec eas submit --platform android --latest
scripts.eas:submit:ios: pnpm -C apps/mobile exec eas submit --platform ios --latest
